---
title: "Chikv | DE tables and volcano plots"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "05.P.compute_de"
  input_rds: "so_w_deseq.rds"
  step: "05.V.de_results"
  pair: "A"   # one of: A, M6, NC, C
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=F, warning=F, echo=F)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
require(data.table)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))

input_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/")
input_var_dir <- paste0(input_step_dir, "results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir))
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)

this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir))
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)

lbl_map <- list(A = "NC_vs_C", M6 = "NC_vs_C", NC = "6M_vs_A", C = "6M_vs_A")
if (!params$pair %in% names(lbl_map))
  stop("Unknown pair: ", params$pair,
       ". Must be one of: ", paste(names(lbl_map), collapse=", "))

n   <- params$pair
lbl <- lbl_map[[n]]
pfx <- paste0(n, ".", lbl)   # e.g. "A.NC_vs_C"

p_adj_filt_tsv_dir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/tables/p_adj_filt/")
dir.create(p_adj_filt_tsv_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
vulcano_outdir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/plots/vulcano/")
dir.create(vulcano_outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

strsanitize <- function(s) gsub(" ", "_", gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "_", s))

h <- function(level, text) writeLines(c(paste0(strrep("#", level), " ", text), ""))
```

```{r load_input_data}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
```

```{r plots_and_tables, results='asis'}
de <- so@misc$de[[n]]
celltypes   <- names(de$pval_filt)
no_deg_cts  <- character(0)
fig_counter <- 0L
table_n     <- 200L

for (ct in celltypes) {
  data_ct  <- de$pval_filt[[ct]]
  cts      <- strsanitize(ct)
  has_data <- !is.null(data_ct) && nrow(data_ct) > 0

  # TSV
  if (has_data) {
    data_ct$cmp  <- lbl
    data_ct$ct   <- ct
    data_ct$gene <- rownames(data_ct)
    fwrite(data_ct[, c("cmp","ct","gene","pct.1","pct.2","p_val","p_val_adj","avg_log2FC")],
           file = paste0(p_adj_filt_tsv_dir, pfx, ".", cts, ".tsv"),
           sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)
  }

  if (!has_data) {
    no_deg_cts <- c(no_deg_cts, ct)
    next
  }

  fig_counter <- fig_counter + 1L

  h(2, paste0(pfx, " \u2014 ", ct))
  h(3, paste0("Fig ", fig_counter, ".", pfx))

  png_path <- paste0(vulcano_outdir, pfx, ".", cts, ".png")
  plt <- EnhancedVolcano(data_ct, lab = rownames(data_ct),
                         x = 'avg_log2FC', y = 'p_val_adj',
                         FCcutoff = 0.58, pCutoff = 0.05) +
    ggtitle(paste0(n, " | ", lbl, " | ", ct))
  ggsave(png_path, plt, width=7, height=5)
  writeLines(paste0("![](", png_path, ")\n"))

  table_data <- data_ct[order(data_ct$p_val_adj), c("avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val","p_val_adj")]
  table_caption <- paste0(pfx, " \u2014 ", ct)
  if (nrow(table_data) > table_n) {
    table_caption <- paste0(table_caption, " \u2014 Top ", table_n, " by adjusted p-value")
  }

  print(knitr::kable(
    head(table_data, table_n),
    digits = 4,
    caption = table_caption
  ))
}

# Collect all no-DEG cell types at the end
if (length(no_deg_cts) > 0) {
  h(2, "No significant DEGs")
  writeLines(paste0("- ", no_deg_cts))
}
```

# Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
